description.s: A grid-based page for composing interactive tool UIs from widget items.
Children are items attached to the page, rendered as widgets on a CSS grid. Each attachment's
The page view maintains runtime shared state (
(number, default 8) - Gap between grid cells in pixels
(number, default 40) - Fixed row height in pixels. Each grid row is this tall; widgets span multiple rows via
. Vertical spacing between widgets is achieved via cell padding rather than row-gap.
(string, optional) - JavaScript code executed before widgets render. Receives
state from persisted data so widgets initialize with correct values.
